tasks.subject: Task 0: Scaffold + brand tokens + base layout
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Running Next.js 15 + TS + Tailwind v4 app with Vyntra brand tokens, Inter font, base layout shell.

```json:metadata
{"files":["package.json","app/layout.tsx","app/globals.css","lib/cn.ts",".env.example"],"verifyCommand":"npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["dev serves / no console errors","build succeeds","brand tokens utilities","Inter via next/font"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: UI primitives + motion system
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Reusable brand-consistent UI primitives + reduced-motion-aware motion variants.

```json:metadata
{"files":["lib/motion.ts","components/ui/Button.tsx","components/ui/Reveal.tsx","components/ui/AnimatedCounter.tsx","components/ui/GlassCard.tsx","components/ui/Modal.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run tests/animated-counter.test.tsx tests/button.test.tsx","acceptanceCriteria":["Button variants + href anchor","Reveal reduced-motion noop","AnimatedCounter reaches target","GlassCard frosted","tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Typed content data layer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Single source of truth content as typed TS modules with realistic placeholder copy.

```json:metadata
{"files":["data/types.ts","data/company.ts","data/services.ts","data/stats.ts","data/whyChoose.ts","data/testimonials.ts","data/caseStudies.ts","data/serviceAreas.ts","data/faqs.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run tests/data.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["9 services unique slugs","company placeholders flagged","typed tsc clean","data.test passes"]}
```

```json:metadata
{"files":["components/layout/GlassNav.tsx","components/layout/MobileMenu.tsx","components/layout/Footer.tsx","components/layout/FloatingQuoteButton.tsx","components/layout/MobileCallBar.tsx","app/layout.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["sticky glass on scroll","nav links + anchors","accessible mobile menu","floating quote + call bar","footer coming-soon portal chips"]}
```
